creator: rnoland@FreeBSD.org
text:

> On 10/22/08, Robert Noland <rnoland@freebsd.org> wrote:
> > Please try the patch

> Works fine, tested with glxinfo, glxgears, heretic, and mplayer.

ok, I'll work on getting this committed...

robert.
